---
title: "Legacy Documentation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Legacy Documentation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Legacy Documentation

This section contains documentation from previous versions of DPmixGPD. These vignettes are preserved for reference and may not reflect the current API exactly.

> **Note**: For the most up-to-date documentation, please refer to the [Manual](manual-index.html) section.

## Getting Started (Legacy)

- [**v00 - Start Here**](legacy/v00-start-here.html) - Original quick start guide
- [**v01 - Introduction**](legacy/v01-introduction.html) - Package overview and motivation
- [**v02 - Available Distributions**](legacy/v02-available-distributions.html) - Detailed distribution catalog with visualizations

## Core Concepts

- [**v03 - Basic Model Compile & Run**](legacy/v03-basic-model-compile-run.html) - Step-by-step model building
- [**v04 - Backends and Workflow**](legacy/v04-backends-and-workflow.html) - CRP vs SB backend comparison

## Unconditional Models

Density estimation without covariates:

- [**v05 - DPmix CRP**](legacy/v05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html) - Basic CRP mixture model
- [**v06 - DPmix CRP Extended**](legacy/v06-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html) - Extended CRP examples with diagnostics
- [**v07 - DPmix SB**](legacy/v07-unconditional-DPmix-SB.html) - Stick-Breaking mixture model
- [**v08 - DPmixGPD CRP**](legacy/v08-unconditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html) - CRP with GPD tail
- [**v09 - DPmixGPD SB**](legacy/v09-unconditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html) - Stick-Breaking with GPD tail

## Conditional Models

Covariate-dependent density estimation:

- [**v10 - DPmix CRP**](legacy/v10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html) - Conditional CRP mixture
- [**v11 - DPmix SB**](legacy/v11-conditional-DPmix-SB.html) - Conditional Stick-Breaking mixture
- [**v12 - DPmixGPD CRP**](legacy/v12-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html) - Conditional CRP with GPD tail
- [**v13 - DPmixGPD SB**](legacy/v13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html) - Conditional Stick-Breaking with GPD tail

## Causal Inference

Treatment effect estimation:

- [**v14 - No Covariates CRP**](legacy/v14-causal-no-x-CRP.html) - Causal inference without confounders
- [**v15 - With Covariates SB**](legacy/v15-causal-x-no-ps-SB.html) - Causal inference with covariates
- [**v16 - Same Backend CRP**](legacy/v16-causal-same-backend-CRP.html) - Treatment/control with same CRP backend
- [**v17 - Same Backend SB**](legacy/v17-causal-same-backend-SB.html) - Treatment/control with same SB backend
- [**v18 - Different Backends CRP**](legacy/v18-causal-different-backends-CRP.html) - Mixed backend causal analysis
- [**v19 - Different Backends SB**](legacy/v19-causal-different-backends-SB.html) - Mixed backend causal analysis

## Troubleshooting

- [**v20 - Troubleshooting**](legacy/v20-troubleshooting.html) - Common issues and solutions

## Why Legacy Documentation?

These vignettes were created during earlier development phases and contain valuable detailed examples. While the core concepts remain valid, some function names, arguments, or workflows may have changed. Always check the current [Manual](manual-index.html) and [Function Reference](../reference/index.html) for the latest API.
